mapper.select: SELECT 전담자번호 memberLoginPK, 지점 memberBranch, 이름 memberUserName, 권한 memberRole, 아이디 memberUserID, 비밀번호 memberUserPW, 관리자권한 memberISManager, 등록일 memberRegDate, 고유번호 memberUniqueNumber FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 WHERE 아이디=#{memberUserID} AND 비밀번호=#{memberUserPW} AND (아이디사용여부 NOT IN ('퇴사','정지','잠금') OR 아이디사용여부 IS NULL)
SELECT 전담자번호 memberLoginPK, 지점 memberBranch, 이름 memberUserName, 권한 memberRole, 아이디 memberUserID FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 WHERE 지점=#{memberBranch}

SELECT A.전담자번호, A.이름 memberUserName, A.아이디 memberUserID, A.지점 memberBranch, A.전화번호 memberPhoneNumber, A.등록일 memberRegDate, A.고유번호 memberUniqueNumber, A.이메일 memberEmail, A.아이디사용여부, A.입사일 memberJoinedDate, A.최종발령일 memberAssignedDate, A.근속기간구분 memberContinuous, B.금일일반취업 memberTodayEmployment, B.금일알선취업 memberTodayPlacement, B.금주일반취업 memberToWeekEmployment, B.금주알선취업 memberToWeekPlacement, B.금월일반취업 memberToMonthEmployment, B.금월알선취업 memberToMonthPlacement, B.금년일반취업 memberToYearEmployment, B.금년알선취업 memberToYearPlacement, B.업무보고일 endUpdateStatus FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 A LEFT OUTER JOIN J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 B ON A.아이디 = B.아이디 WHERE A.아이디=#{memberUserID} AND A.비밀번호=#{memberUserPW}

SELECT A.전담자번호, A.이름 memberUserName, A.아이디 memberUserID, A.지점 memberBranch, A.전화번호 memberPhoneNumber, A.등록일 memberRegDate, A.고유번호 memberUniqueNumber, A.이메일 memberEmail, A.아이디사용여부, A.입사일 memberJoinedDate, A.최종발령일 memberAssignedDate, A.근속기간구분 memberContinuous, A.금일일반취업 memberTodayEmployment, A.금일알선취업 memberTodayPlacement, A.금주일반취업 memberToWeekEmployment, A.금주알선취업 memberToWeekPlacement, A.금월일반취업 memberToMonthEmployment, A.금월알선취업 memberToMonthPlacement, A.금년일반취업 memberToYearEmployment, A.금년알선취업 memberToYearPlacement, A.실적저장일 endUpdateStatus FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 A WHERE A.아이디=#{memberUserID}
